mapper.select: SELECT id, reader_id, reason, violation_count, blacklisted, start_time, end_time, create_time FROM blacklist ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, reader_id, reason, violation_count, blacklisted, start_time, end_time, create_time FROM blacklist WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, reader_id, reason, violation_count, blacklisted, start_time, end_time, create_time FROM blacklist WHERE blacklisted = 1 AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time > NOW()) ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blacklist (reader_id, reason, violation_count, blacklisted, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{reason}, #{violationCount}, #{blacklisted}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE blacklist SET reason = #{reason}, violation_count = #{violationCount}, blacklisted = #{blacklisted}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
